name: SeqGPT: A Constrained Transformer Agent for the Inverse Designof Multi-Panel Composite Structures

description: arXiv:2607.11910v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Optimizing composite stacking sequences to match continuous targets (e.g., Lamination or Buckling Parameters) with discrete manufacturing constraints represents a challenging combinatorial inverse problem that regularly occurs in composite design especially when numerical optimization approaches are used (bi-step, bi-level configurations). author: Driss Chraibi (Toulouse INP), Alejandro Garc\'ia Pis (IRIT), St\'ephane Grihon (IRIT), Sixin Zhang (IRIT)
